short_meaning: Dedicated to Natas, a Greek god

name: Nerty
short_meaning: A river nymph or water deity

name: Ondrea
short_meaning: On, towards + droas, a flow, stream

name: Tanitansy
short_meaning: Goddess of the sea and fertility

name: Tonia
short_meaning: Diver, or from Tonia, a place

name: Adriell
short_meaning: Man of noble or man of mountain

name: Akela
short_meaning: Female dog in The Jungle Book

name: Andromada
short_meaning: In Greek mythology, Andromeda was a beautiful princess chained to a rock as a sacrifice to a sea monster.

name: Arezzini
short_meaning: From the place of the resin

name: Auliffe
short_meaning: Derived from the Greek word 'aulos' meaning 'duck' or 'reed instrument'

name: Autrey
short_meaning: From the Greek 'autos' meaning self and 'treo' meaning to nourish or protect.

name: Bac
short_meaning: Short form of Babacus, derived from Babas, meaning father.

name: Bass
short_meaning: From the Greek word 'bassos' meaning 'heavy, weighty'

name: Bille
short_meaning: Derived from the Greek word 'bilos' meaning 'rich' or 'noble'

name: Bilow
short_meaning: From the Greek word bēlos, meaning 'little one' or 'infant'

name: Blim
short_meaning: Derived from the Greek word 'blima', meaning 'sickle' or 'curve'.

name: Bock
short_meaning: Germanic: From the Old High German word 'buca' meaning cow or ox.

name: Bolitho
short_meaning: From Bolos, signifying a yoke or burden

name: Bollay
short_meaning: From Bolos, meaning 'dedicated to a god'

name: Dollie
short_meaning: Pet name derived from 'dolly' meaning 'little one'

name: Emmuela
short_meaning: Divine labor, toil, or emma (mother) + helle (light)

name: English
short_meaning: Modern European language derived from Latin and Germanic roots

name: Epps
short_meaning: Derived from the Greek word 'epi', meaning 'on' or 'above'

name: Erikson
short_meaning: Ruler of the army of the gods

name: Erme
short_meaning: Ermine: A white animal with black spots, symbolizing purity and grace.

name: Ermine
short_meaning: Ermine: Derived from the Latin word 'erminus', meaning 'ermine', a type of weasel with white winter fur.

name: Estes
short_meaning: Derived from Greek 'Eastus', meaning 'easterner' or 'man from the east'

name: Ewer
short_meaning: Ewer is derived from the Greek word ‘oinocheos’, meaning ‘wine container’.

name: Fabriane
short_meaning: From Faber, the Latin word for 'maker'

name: Fernandes
short_meaning: Fern: ferne = distant + andes: from Andes

name: Fife
short_meaning: Scottish: Derived from the area name Fife in Scotland

name: Fosdick
short_meaning: From the Old English words 'fos' meaning 'foal' and 'dic' meaning 'son of'

name: Foskett
short_meaning: From the Old English 'Fulgeset' meaning 'God's pledge'

name: Frame
short_meaning: Ancient Greek origin: to enclose, to embrace

name: Frantz
short_meaning: French form of François, meaning 'Frenchman' or 'Free man'

name: French
short_meaning: From the Franks, a Germanic people

name: Friday
short_meaning: Day named after the Norse goddess Freyja

name: Garlanda
short_meaning: Garland of flowers or precious stones

name: Gipson
short_meaning: Derived from 'Giffard', an Old French name meaning 'giver of treasure'

name: Granlund
short_meaning: Gran: hill, land, lund: grove, clearing

name: Graves
short_meaning: Dweller by the graves, burial mound

name: Grearson
short_meaning: Strong ruler, son of the spear

name: Grishilde
short_meaning: Struggle with the grace of God

name: Groos
short_meaning: Groos is a Greek name meaning 'powerful, strong'.

name: Guibert
short_meaning: Guis + berht: Guis (war, battle) + berht (bright, famous)

name: Hake
short_meaning: Derived from the Greek word 'hagos' meaning 'holy'.

name: Harts
short_meaning: Hart is a deer, symbolizing strength and endurance.

name: Hatch
short_meaning: From the Old English word 'heah', meaning 'high or noble'.

name: Hatcher
short_meaning: From the old English hathe, hatch meaning to hatch, or hewer, maker

name: Hebbe
short_meaning: Derived from the Greek word 'hebbos', meaning 'youth' or 'infant'

name: Hebner
short_meaning: Hebner is a Germanic name of unknown origin.

name: Heins
short_meaning: He who is kind and faithful

name: Hellene
short_meaning: Greek goddess of learning and civilization

name: Hendrix
short_meaning: No meaning in English or any language of origin

name: Henryson
short_meaning: Ruler of the home, son of Henry

name: Hera
short_meaning: Goddess of marriage, childbirth, and women

name: Hillegass
short_meaning: Hillegass means 'festive, joyous' in Old High German

name: Hilten
short_meaning: Hilten means 'shining light' or 'helping friend' in Greek.

name: Hollander
short_meaning: From the Dutch word 'Hollander', meaning 'from Holland'

name: Holtorf
short_meaning: Farmstead by the hollow or valley

name: Hopper
short_meaning: One who carries, or a rabbit

name: Husch
short_meaning: Derived from the Greek word 'huskos', meaning 'hospitable' or 'friendly'.

name: Ingham
short_meaning: From the homestead or river valley

name: Irby
short_meaning: From the Greek word 'irbis', meaning 'fountain' or 'well'.

name: Ivey
short_meaning: Derived from the English surname meaning 'archer'

name: Jamel
short_meaning: Gentle wave, one who is calm

name: Janus
short_meaning: God of beginnings, gates, and transitions

name: Jarvey
short_meaning: Jarvey is of unknown origin and meaning.

name: Jem
short_meaning: Shortened form of the Greek name Iason, meaning 'healer'

name: Maryjane
short_meaning: Mary, Jane (Sea of bitterness, God's grace)

name: Saw
short_meaning: Greek: Saw, the name of a martyr

name: Scottie
short_meaning: From the Scottish name Scott, meaning 'descendant of Scott' or 'wanderer'.

name: Syd
short_meaning: Stream, ocean, or god of the sea

name: Tab
short_meaning: Derived from the Greek word 'ta pata', meaning 'to touch'.

name: Xymenes
short_meaning: Greek name derived from the word xyma, meaning 'knee'.

name: Yorgos
short_meaning: George, Farmer, Worker of the earth

name: Apollo
short_meaning: God of the Sun and Light

name: Applegate
short_meaning: Derived from old English 'æpeling' meaning 'he who lives near an apple tree'

name: Ban
short_meaning: Derived from the Hebrew word 'ban', meaning 'son of', or 'builder'.
